Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer extends Object implements Serializable
Convenience optimizer for full ProcessModel throughput-to-bottleneck studies.

This class wraps ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator for the common engineering workflow: map producer/feed controls, load installed equipment capacities, scale production, and return a case table showing the active bottleneck at each iteration.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Method Details

    • addProducer

      public ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer addProducer(String name, String address, double lowerMultiplier, double upperMultiplier, String unit)
      Adds a producer/feed control using its current model value as base value.
      Parameters:
      name - control name
      address - area-qualified automation address
      lowerMultiplier - lower allowed multiplier
      upperMultiplier - upper allowed multiplier
      unit - unit used when reading and setting the value
      Returns:
      this optimizer for chaining

    • addProducer

      public ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer addProducer(String name, String address, double baseValue, double lowerMultiplier, double upperMultiplier, String unit)
      Adds a producer/feed control with an explicit base value.
      Parameters:
      name - control name
      address - area-qualified automation address
      baseValue - base value before multiplier scaling
      lowerMultiplier - lower allowed multiplier
      upperMultiplier - upper allowed multiplier
      unit - unit used when setting the value
      Returns:
      this optimizer for chaining

    • addProducerMultiplier

      public ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer addProducerMultiplier(String name, double lowerMultiplier, double upperMultiplier, BiConsumer<ProcessModel,Double> multiplierSetter)
      Adds a custom producer multiplier setter.
      Parameters:
      name - control name
      lowerMultiplier - lower allowed multiplier
      upperMultiplier - upper allowed multiplier
      multiplierSetter - custom setter receiving the model and multiplier
      Returns:
      this optimizer for chaining

      name - objective name
      evaluator - objective evaluator
      unit - objective unit
      Returns:
      this optimizer for chaining

    • findMaximumThroughput

      public ProcessModelThroughputResult findMaximumThroughput(double lowerMultiplier, double upperMultiplier, double tolerance)
      Finds the maximum feasible scalar throughput multiplier.
      Parameters:
      lowerMultiplier - lower search multiplier
      upperMultiplier - upper search multiplier
      tolerance - multiplier tolerance for binary search
      Returns:
      throughput optimization result with all evaluated cases

    • isIncludeEquipmentCapacityConstraints

      public boolean isIncludeEquipmentCapacityConstraints()
      Checks whether equipment capacity constraints are automatically added.
      Returns:
      true when enabled

    • setIncludeEquipmentCapacityConstraints

      public ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer setIncludeEquipmentCapacityConstraints(boolean includeEquipmentCapacityConstraints)
      Sets whether equipment capacity constraints are automatically added.
      Parameters:
      includeEquipmentCapacityConstraints - true to include equipment capacity constraints
      Returns:
      this optimizer for chaining

    • isIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints

      public boolean isIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints()
      Checks whether strategy-generated capacity constraints are included.
      Returns:
      true when generic strategy constraints are included with installed direct limits

    • setIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints

      public ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer setIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints(boolean includeStrategyCapacityConstraints)
      Sets whether strategy-generated capacity constraints are included.

      The default is false so fixed-equipment throughput studies are controlled by explicit installed limits loaded from design data or attached directly to equipment. Set this to true for screening studies where generic equipment strategy constraints should also participate.

      Parameters:
      includeStrategyCapacityConstraints - true to include strategy-generated constraints
      Returns:
      this optimizer for chaining

    • validateSetup

      private void validateSetup(double tolerance)
      Validates optimizer setup.
      Parameters:
      tolerance - multiplier tolerance

      private void resolveBaseValues()
      Resolves base values for automation-addressed controls.

      private ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator createScalarEvaluator(double lower, double upper)
      Creates a scalar evaluator with one throughput multiplier variable.
      Parameters:
      lower - lower multiplier bound
      upper - upper multiplier bound
      Returns:
      configured evaluator

      private ThroughputCaseRow evaluateCase(ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator evaluator, int caseNumber, double multiplier)
      Evaluates one multiplier case.
      Parameters:
      evaluator - configured evaluator
      caseNumber - case sequence number
      multiplier - throughput multiplier
      Returns:
      evaluated case row
